summary: The legal input contains at most 100 gains, which is too small to separate linear and quadratic Python implementations through an honest runtime trend.

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference performs exactly one running-sum update and one maximum comparison for each of at most 100 gains.
Authored cases cover both public examples, single-segment value boundaries, all-zero gains, an interior peak, a final peak, recovery to zero, repeated peaks, and the maximum length.
